name: industry-agents
description: Crew assembled to produce industry-specific analyses of Weaviate features. Agents: BiomedicalMarketingAgent, HealthcareMarketingAgent, FinancialMarketingAgent. Tasks: one task per agent describing investigation of a given {weaviate_feature} and producing an industry-specific analysis. The Crew kickoff_for_each iterates inputs (weaviate_features) for each task; iteration is represented via feature Resource individuals (see Issues/Assumptions).
